name: veriphy-agent
description: A three-step agent that post-processes any LLM response to identify verifiable factual claims, shortlist the 3 most distinctive ones (using Jaccard similarity deduplication), and retrieve real arXiv paper citations for each. Works with any topic — no domain configuration needed.
author: Automorph

capabilities.name: Mark Claims
capabilities.description: Reads every sentence in an LLM response and labels each as a verifiable factual claim or not. Transition phrases, computed results, opinions, and meta-commentary are never marked.

responseText.description: Full LLM response text to analyse

capabilities.name: Find Citations
capabilities.description: Receives pre-selected claims and queries arXiv for a real paper matching each. No LLM key required for this step. Claims with no arXiv result are de-marked.

marked.description: Output of mark-claims, optionally filtered to 3 shortlisted candidates

citation.description: Author et al., Title, arXiv:ID, Year — null if no paper found

environment.name: OLLAMA_API_KEY
environment.description: API key for Nemotron (Step 1 claim identification only)

environment.name: PORT
environment.description: Port the standalone agent server listens on

steps: 2. agent.shortlist()        — Step 2: client-side, pick top 3 diverse claims
3. agent.cite()             — Step 3: arXiv lookup, no LLM needed
